title: 宝塚記念の後に・春のグランプリ制覇！

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I did it... Trainer, I did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I kept my first promise! I won the Takarazuka
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pull Mejiro Ryan, who's flexing a victory pose,
over to a more suitable location.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming to see me today, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was able to pay you back for all the support
you've given me! But I still need your help, 'cause
I'm gonna win the Arima Kinen too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My goodness. Is flashing one's muscles a
respectable greeting? This girl...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, I'm going to entrust the Mejiro
medium-distance races to you for a while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've lost today, my plan is to focus on
being a stayer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Of course, there is a distance where both of us can aptly display our strengths.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let us meet at the illustrious Nakayama
Racecourse, for the year-end Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Obviously you'll be an even bigger star than you
are now. I hope you grow to become an exquisite
lady.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer... How am I supposed to do that in just
six months?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It may be a taller task than becoming a star
racer... But we'll have to see what we can do.
